description.en-US: Pope, monk, Doctor of the Church (c. 540–604). The *Pastoral Rule* shaped the medieval episcopate, and the *Register of Letters* (420 letters) maps the transition from the patristic age to the Middle Ages.

body.en-US: Pope, monk, Doctor of the Church (c. 540–604). The *Pastoral Rule* shaped the medieval episcopate, and the *Register of Letters* (420 letters) maps the transition from the patristic age to the Middle Ages.
2 works in the canonical 19th-century English translations (ANF / NPNF, ed. Roberts & Donaldson / Schaff & Wace), sourced from the New Advent archive.
